notes: DeepSpeed's ZeRO = "ZEro Redundancy Optimizer" (Microsoft, arXiv:1910.02054). Stylized capitalization (capital Z and O) signals it reads as the English word "zero" — identical to the number, NOT spelled out Z-E-R-O. STRESS: ZEER-oh. Stages are ZeRO-1/2/3 ("zero one/two/three"). Distinct from existing "zero-shot".
